name: Buried Treasures
recipeIngredient: 4 Tablespoons BAKER'S Semi-Sweet Real Chocolate Chips
1/2 Cup thawed COOL WHIP Whipped Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the milk into a small bowl.
2. Add the pudding mix and beat with a wire whisk for 2 minutes.
3. Let stand for 5 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, place 1 tablespoon of the "treasures" (chocolate chips) into each of 4 dessert glasses.
5. Spoon the pudding over the "treasures".
6. Refrigerate until ready to serve. Garnish each serving with 2 tablespoons whipped topping.
7. Makes 4 servings.
